title: Houthi Escalation Threat — Red Sea Maritime Ban
snippet: Houthis declared a 'complete and total ban on Israeli maritime navigation in Red Sea' and threatened to close Bab el-Mandeb if the conflict escalates further. With IRGC claiming Hormuz closure and Houthis threatening Bab el-Mandeb, both of the world's critical maritime chokepoints connecting the Indian Ocean to global markets are now under simultaneous threat.
tag_reason: 후티 반군 홍해 항행 금지 선언 — 호르무즈+바벨만데브 동시 위협, 글로벌 해상 무역 양대 초크포인트 동시 봉쇄 위기
